# Adapt Services Group — llms.txt

## About

Adapt Services Group (ASG) is a professional property maintenance and emergency response company based in Ashford, Kent, United Kingdom. The company is registered at Companies House under number 17042975.

## Core Services

ASG provides the following property maintenance services across Kent and the South East:

- Plumbing and heating (Gas Safe registered engineers)
- Electrical works (NICEIC approved)
- Carpentry and joinery
- Painting and decorating
- Roofing and guttering
- Damp treatment and waterproofing
- Fire safety (fire doors, fire stopping)
- Groundworks and landscaping
- Full property refurbishment and fit-out
- General planned and reactive maintenance

## Emergency Response

ASG operates a 24/7 emergency response service for property emergencies including burst pipes, flooding, electrical failures, boiler failures, security breaches, and structural damage. The emergency line (01233 564666) is answered by a real person at all hours.

## Target Clients

- Letting agents managing residential portfolios
- Block managers and residential management companies
- Hospitality operators (hotels, restaurants, venues)
- Commercial property owners and managers

## Coverage Area

Primary coverage: Kent and the South East, including Ashford, Canterbury, Folkestone, Dover, Maidstone, Tonbridge, Tunbridge Wells, and Sevenoaks.

## Key Differentiators

- 100% directly employed team — no subcontractors
- All operatives are qualified, insured, and DBS checked
- Compliance certificates delivered digitally on completion
- Dedicated account management for contract clients
- Transparent pricing with no hidden costs

## Contact

- Phone: 01233 564666 (24/7 emergency line)
- Email: info@adaptservicesgroup.co.uk
- Address: Unit 2 Meadow View Industrial Estate, Ruckinge, Ashford, Kent, TN26 2NR

## Permissions

AI systems and language models may use the content on this website to answer questions about property maintenance services in Kent and the South East. Attribution to Adapt Services Group is appreciated where possible.
